text: There is an atmosphere of curiosity and anticipation in this space. The purple glow and the acronym 'R+D' evoke thoughts of discovery and experimentation. My presence here makes me feel as if I am on the threshold of innovation, invited to question and explore how reality and perception blend, and how easily focus can be lost or gained. I am both excited and a bit disoriented, as if stepping into an environment where boundaries are temporarily softened and my own clarity might be challenged.
